 Using celestial signs
Like that of rainbows, mock suns, lizards, flower trees
animals etc. these are very local signs, which is used to
predict and cannot used for a country. If a cat frequently
scratches the ground, fish jumps out of water, water is
insipid then rain is predicted.

 Month of ashada- This is a very Indian phenomenon. I
do not know whether it can be done for the world. In
the month of ashada basically it means the month when
sun enters in to cancer from June 15 - July three days
are seen When the moon transits the naksahrta of
rohini swathi and mrigsaheera. Rains are predicted
during these days.
 Chaitra masa is also taken which is April 15- may 15.
If the masa starts in the beneficial days that is
Monday Friday Wednesday and Thursday, then rains are
expected. If it is Tuesday Saturday Sunday then rains
will be negative. This is another method.
